instruction: The blue progress bar on the home modern icon has slipped out of place. Move it back to its original position. (subtler offset — read the original coordinates carefully).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/home-modern.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.25 21v-4.875c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h2.25c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125V21m0 0h4.5V3.545M12.75 21h7.5V10.75M2.25 21h1.5m18 0h-18M2.25 9l4.5-1.636M18.75 3l-1.5.545m0 6.205 3 1m1.5.5-1.5-.5M6.75 7.364V3h-3v18m3-13.636 10.5-3.819"/></g>
  <rect id="bar" fill="#3b82f6" x="22" y="116" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
target_svg:
